name: Miss Crow with Mr. Lizard
overview: Gu Chuan is a passion-filled, vibrant young man with his whole life ahead of him – until his life is turned upside down by a sudden traffic accident. He suffers life-threatening injuries to his heart and surgeons are able to save him by giving him an emergency heart transplant.

trailers.title: Miss Crow with Mr. Lizard | Trailer | Allen Ren & Xing Fei start a romantic love |乌鸦小姐与蜥蜴先生| ENG SUB
